title: RealMLP](https://www.kaggle.com/code/masayakawamata/s6e5-stacking-vibe-coding%22,%22https://www.kaggle.com/code/oskarseweryn/playground-s6e5-tabular-ensemble/log%22]},{%22title%22:%22RealMLP) or PyTabKit diversity model
summary: Train a compact RealMLP/PyTabKit tabular neural model on the engineered feature set and use it only as a diversity component in a blend.
rationale: External notebooks for this competition explored RealMLP/PyTabKit, suggesting a neural tabular model may provide prediction diversity beyond gradient-boosted trees. The attached run did not explore this family directly.
implementation_hint: Use pytabkit RealMLP with bounded runtime, standardized numeric features, encoded categoricals, and the same OOF folds as tree models. First test standalone OOF behavior and then a small blend with LightGBM/CatBoost predictions.
expected_effect: Small blend gain with medium-low confidence; standalone performance may be weaker than trees but useful for diversity.
risk: GPU/CPU runtime and package compatibility can be limiting. Do not let the neural model dominate the blend unless OOF evidence is strong.
